{{Quote|Good evening, ladies and gentlemen, and welcome aboard the pleasure yacht ''Arleen'', now in interstellar transit from Antipose IX to—|A pilot droid|<ref name="LCMS" />}}
The '''''Arleen''''' was a pleasure [[Yacht/Legends|yacht]] that was in service<ref name="LCMS" /> by [[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]].<ref name="Date" /> It shared its name with the [[Arleen system/Legends|Arleen system]] and the [[Arleen Loop]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> The ''Arleen'' made [[Standard year/Legends|year]]-long tours from the [[Oseon system/Legends|Oseon system]] to the [[Antipose system/Legends|Antipose system]] celestial body [[Antipose IX]] as well as<ref name="Gamer5">{{GamerCite|5|A Campaign Guide to the Centrality}}</ref> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="CSWE Antipose">{{CSWECite|I|36|Antipose}}</ref> [[Antipose XII]].<ref name="Gamer5" />

In 3 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]],<ref name="Date" /> the [[Gambler/Legends|gambler]] and [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] rented a [[Unidentified pilot droid (Oseon 2795)|pilot droid]] to help him travel in his [[Starship/Legends|starship]], the [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|light freighter]] [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], from the [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] [[Oseon 2795]] to the planet [[Rafa IV]] in the [[Rafa system/Legends|Rafa system]]. Once the [[Light freighter/Legends|freighter]] arrived at its destination, the [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] addressed a non-existent audience as if it was aboard ''Arleen'' instead and claimed that the vessel was undergoing an [[Star/Legends|interstellar]] voyage from Antipose IX. At that point, Calrissian, who had become highly annoyed with the droid, switched it off.<ref name="LCMS" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Arleen'' was first mentioned in ''[[Lando Calrissian and the Mindharp of Sharu]]'', the [[1983]] first entry in [[Star Wars: The Lando Calrissian Adventures|''The Lando Calrissian Adventures'']] trilogy of novels by [[L. Neil Smith]].<ref name="LCMS" /> According to the [[Star Wars Insider 145|145th issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' magazine<ref name="Insider 145">{{InsiderCite|145|Authors of the Expanded Universe|Authors of the Expanded Universe: L. Neil Smith}}</ref>—published by [[October 21]], [[2013]]<ref name="Insider145 date">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-insider-145-from-topps-to-gold-bikini-bottoms|text=''Star Wars Insider'' #145: From Topps to (Gold Bikini) Bottoms|nolive=1}}</ref>—Smith [[Tuckerization|cannibalized]] the names of colleagues to create names for the ''Arleen'' and [[Douglas III|other]] [[Paulking XIV|subjects]] from the book.<ref name="Insider 145" />
